title: callitriche deflexa
intro: Callitriche deflexa, also known as bent stem waterwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Callitriche deflexa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Callitriche deflexa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
